posts.description:
✨ Small Change. Big Difference.

Did you know that a missing tooth can lead to shifting teeth and bone loss over time?

This before-and-after transformation showcases the benefits of an implant-supported crown, custom-crafted to blend seamlessly with the patient's natural smile. The result is a restoration that looks natural, feels comfortable, and functions just like a real tooth.

A missing tooth can affect more than your appearance, it can impact your confidence, comfort, and everyday activities like eating and speaking. Dental implants provide a long-lasting solution that restores both function and aesthetics while helping to preserve your oral health.

🦷 Benefits of implant-supported crowns:
✔️ Natural-looking appearance
✔️ Long-lasting and durable
✔️ Restores chewing function
✔️ Helps preserve jawbone health
✔️ Protects neighboring teeth by eliminating the need for alteration

A complete smile is about more than aesthetics, it's about restoring comfort, confidence, and quality of life.

Schedule your consultation today and discover how dental implants can transform your smile.

📍 Located in 992 Columbus Ave, NYC
📞 Call now to book your appointment: (917) 261-7555 
🌐 Visit us at: http://www.uwsdentalonline.com

🦷 Root Canal Treatment Can Help Save Your Tooth

If you are experiencing tooth pain, sensitivity to hot or cold, swelling, or discomfort while chewing, you may need root canal treatment. Root canal therapy removes infection from inside the tooth and helps preserve your natural tooth structure.

At Upper West Side Dental, we provide gentle and comfortable root canal treatment focused on relieving pain and restoring your oral health.

Benefits of Root Canal Treatment:
✔️ Eliminates infection
✔️ Relieves discomfort
✔️ Saves your natural tooth
✔️ Restores function and appearance
✔️ Helps prevent tooth extraction

Don’t wait for dental pain to worsen. Early treatment can help protect your smile and overall oral health.

📍 Located in 992 Columbus Ave, NYC
📞 Call now to book your appointment: (917) 261-7555 
🌐 Visit us at: http://www.uwsdentalonline.com

☀️ Summer is the perfect time to refresh your smile! 🦷

Before vacations, beach days, and summer events fill your calendar, make time for your routine dental check-up. Regular visits help keep your teeth and gums healthy, prevent future dental issues, and keep your smile looking bright all season long. 😁✨

At Upper West Side Dental, we’re here to make your visit comfortable, stress-free, and personalized to your needs.

✔️ Professional cleanings
✔️ Comprehensive dental exams
✔️ Preventive care & early detection
✔️ Personalized treatment recommendations

Don’t let a busy summer schedule delay your dental health, keep your smile healthy and confident all season long! 

📍 Located in 992 Columbus Ave, NYC
📞 Call now to book your appointment: (917) 261-7555 
🌐 Visit us at: http://www.uwsdentalonline.com
Schedule your summer dental check-up today and enjoy the season with a healthier, brighter smile! ✨

🦷 Do You Invest in Your Dental Health?

Your smile is one of your most valuable assets, are you giving it the care it deserves?

Investing in your dental health isn’t just about appearances. It’s about:
✔️ Preventing costly and complex treatments
✔️ Maintaining strong, healthy teeth and gums
✔️ Supporting your overall health and well-being

Routine checkups, cleanings, and early treatment go a long way in protecting your smile for years to come.

✨ Don’t wait until there’s a problem. A healthy smile is always a smart investment. 🦷

📍 Located in 992 Columbus Ave, NYC
📞 Call now to book your appointment: (917) 261-7555 
🌐 Visit us at: http://www.uwsdentalonline.com

Schedule your visit today and take the first step toward a healthier smile!

Looking for your perfect dental care partner?

Your smile deserves a team you can trust. 🦷✨

At Upper West Side Dental, we go beyond treatment. We focus on your comfort, prevention, and long-term oral health. From stress-free visits to personalized care, we’re here for you every step of the way.

Our services include:
✔️ Stress-free dental visits
✔️ Preventive care to help avoid future issues
✔️ Personalized treatment plans
✔️ A focus on maintaining your natural smile

Let us help you achieve a healthy, confident smile that lasts.

📍 992 Columbus Ave, New York, NY
📞 (917) 261-7555
🌐 http://www.uwsdentalonline.com

Schedule your visit today and experience dental care that is comfortable, simple, and tailored to you.

🚨 Dental Emergency? We’re Here When You Need Us Most 🦷

Tooth pain doesn’t wait and neither should you. At Upper West Side Dental, we provide prompt, compassionate emergency care to get you out of pain and back to smiling fast.

Whether it’s a severe toothache, broken tooth, swelling, or sudden discomfort, our team is ready to help with same-day emergency appointments whenever possible.

✔️ Fast relief from pain
✔️ Same-day emergency visits available
✔️ Gentle care
✔️ Clear treatment options & transparent pricing

Don’t ignore the pain, early care can prevent bigger problems.

Your comfort is our priority. Relief starts here. 💙

📍 Located in 992 Columbus Ave, NYC
📞 Call now to book your appointment: (917) 261-7555 
🌐 Visit us at: http://www.uwsdentalonline.com

Nervous about the dentist or feeling anxious about dental treatment? You’re not alone, we’re here to help.
At Upper West Side Dental, we offer nitrous oxide (laughing gas) to help you feel calm, relaxed, and comfortable during your procedure, whether it’s cleaning, filling, or more advanced treatment. This safe and fast-acting option is ideal for patients with dental anxiety or sensitivity.
✔️ Ideal for anxious patients
✔️ Reduces stress and discomfort
✔️ Works quickly and wears off quickly
✔️ Helps you get the care you need comfortably
Don’t let fear delay your dental health. Your comfort is our priority. 🦷

Schedule your visit today and experience stress-free dentistry with nitrous oxide. 😌 

📍 Located in 992 Columbus Ave, NYC
📞 Call now to book your appointment: (917) 261-7555 
🌐 Visit us at: http://www.uwsdentalonline.com

🦷 What Are Dental Implants and Why Do Patients Love Them?

Missing a tooth doesn’t just affect your smile, it can affect your confidence, comfort, and even how you eat.

Dental implants are one of the most advanced and natural-looking solutions for replacing missing teeth. Designed to function just like a real tooth, implants restore both appearance and strength, helping you smile, speak, and chew with confidence again.

✨ Why patients love dental implants:
• Look and feel like natural teeth
• Stable and long-lasting
• Help maintain jawbone health
• Restore full chewing ability
• No slipping like dentures

A strong, healthy smile can make a huge difference in everyday life. If you’ve been considering options for replacing a missing tooth, a consultation can help determine if dental implants are right for you.

📍 Located in 992 Columbus Ave, NYC
📞 Call now to book your consultation: (917) 261-7555
🌐 Visit us at: http://www.uwsdentalonline.com

#DentalImplants #ImplantDentistry #SmileRestoration #MissingTooth #ToothReplacement #HealthySmile #ConfidentSmile #NYCDentist #UpperWestSideDental #CosmeticDentistry #ModernDentistry #SmileMakeover #NYCSmile #ManhattanDentist #DentalCare #SmileConfidence #ImplantSupported

✨ Straighten Your Smile with ClearCorrect®✨

Looking for a discreet way to straighten your teeth? ClearCorrect®  offer a modern, nearly invisible alternative to traditional metal braces. Designed to fit seamlessly into your lifestyle.

✔️ Clear, comfortable aligners
✔️ Removable for easy eating & brushing
✔️ Custom-made for precise results
✔️ No metal brackets or wires
✔️ Ideal for teens & adults

ClearCorrect aligners gently move your teeth into proper alignment while keeping your smile natural and confident throughout treatment. Whether you’re fixing crowding, spacing, or bite concerns, we’ll create a personalized plan just for you.

📅 Schedule your ClearCorrect® consultation today and start your journey toward a straighter, healthier smile!

📍 Located in 992 Columbus Ave, NYC
📞 Call now to book your appointment: (917) 261-7555 
🌐 Visit us at: http://www.uwsdentalonline.com

🚨 Dental Emergency? Don't Wait.

Severe tooth pain, a knocked-out tooth, uncontrolled bleeding, or sudden swelling — these are signs you need to see an emergency dentist right away.

At Upper West Side Dental, we offer same-day evaluations with no referral needed. Our team is here to help you get the relief you need, fast.

📍 Located on the Upper West Side, Manhattan

summary.snippet: "Great location, friendly staff, and wonderful services."
"The music and sunglasses during the cleaning are also a nice touch."
"Just got my fillings done, very easy and painless experience!"

most_relevant.description:
I have been going to UWSD for about a year starting wlith a tooth extraction to a tooth implant. Dr .Shirely explained each procedure step by step. He is very professional, gentle and thorough. He is an outstanding dentist and his bedside manner is very calming. The Front Desk Coordinator is very pleasant and provides excellent customer services. I highly recommend this team.

.

I had an emergency tooth extraction here and couldn’t have asked for a better experience. The doctor made what could have been a stressful situation so much calmer than I expected.
A few things that really stood out:
• They offer laughing gas to help with dental anxiety, which made a huge difference for me
• The doctor actually listens when you tell him something hurts and adjusts accordingly - no brushing off your concerns
• He provided a clear treatment plan with estimated costs, organized by priority so you know what needs attention first
• While they offer cosmetic services, there’s zero pressure - you can choose what you want done without feeling pushed into anything
If you’re someone who gets anxious about dental work or have had bad experiences elsewhere, I’d highly recommend giving this practice a try.

I started going to UWS Dental this year and have had such a positive experience. Dr. Shirley is very thorough and truly wants what is best for his patients. I tried a few other dental offices before this one, but none were as organized, reliable, and good as this one. Definitely the place to go if you’re looking for a permanent dentist in the city. Accepts Delta Dental for those curious!

This is a great dental practice. Dr. Shirley is terrific at his job, but he's also kind and super friendly. Staff is excellent. Also, they start on time and are up front about costs. I've always been really fearful of the dentist, but since I started going to Upper West Side Dental, it's great. Can't imagine going anywhere else.

Went in just for a check up. Great family business. The dental care was immaculate. Dr. Shirley was so comprehensive, he didn’t give me any salesman vibes. Showed me exactly why and how I should approach my preventive dental care. He made it very easy for me to come back. His office is a great breath of fresh air from someone who does not like dental work. He makes it a very stress free and enjoyable experience. Go to Upper West Side Dental!

They want you to come in without checking your insurance if that covers your treatment or not.  They  told me they would not know until I come in. They are lazy to check your insurance for you or they just want to trick you in and waste your time or you have to pay even you have an insurance

I am so thankful I’ve started seeing Dr. Shirley. My husband and I are both patients and we both have had great experiences, namely with receiving fillings. My husband told me that this was the first time a filling was not painful, he said “for the first time I didn’t feel anything!” That made me feel comfortable enough to move forward with scheduling a filling replacement/new filling at UWS dental. I have extreme dental anxiety and tried his sedation through nitrous oxide. My body didn’t respond well to it and it made me very jittery and anxious, so I asked him to remove it and continue the filling without the nitrous. He was so calm and patient with me. I was nearly jumping out of the chair while he was trying to work. Seriously, I was the worst type of patient he could have had! He said “I’m not rushing on this, I’ve been in your position before, I understand.” I just felt so cared for and was so pleased with this experience. The filling itself is smooth and comfortable— no complaints there. Dr. Shirley did his best to make a really uncomfortable procedure a pleasant one. If you’re looking for compassion and care, see Dr. Shirley at UWS Dental.

I had a great experience at Upper West Side Dental. Dr. Shirley is very kind and efficient and makes each visit very comfortable. Ana at the front desk is wonderfully helpful and welcoming with answering any questions I had before and after my visit. Both Dr. Shirley and Ana provided thorough aftercare instructions, and the front desk’s response time when I reach out is always quick.
